text:

Offseason is where championships are built.

text:
Studying my pass sets from this season. Hand placement and anchor have improved, but footwork timing on outside rushes is my next focus.

Film don't lie.

#2029Recruit #OL #FootballRecruiting #OffensiveLine #CFBRecruiting

text:
Friday night lights are earned Monday through Thursday in the classroom.

3.5 GPA and climbing. The work never stops — on or off the field.

#2029Recruit #StudentAthlete #OL #FootballRecruiting #Pewaukee
notes: Photo of Jacob studying or at school. Academic focus post. Could be a desk/books photo or school hallway shot.

text:

Squat PR: 350 lbs. Next target: 375.

New week, new opportunity to grow.

text:

Deadlift: 445 → 460

text:

11 pancakes. Hungry for more.

Give back whenever you can.

text:

This team taught me what sacrifice looks like. Forever grateful for every brother in that locker room.

text:

265 was the old standard. Time to push past it.

Every rep is a deposit in the bank.

Accountability starts with the tape.

text:

Back home ready to apply everything.
